settingsModal.title: Settings
settingsModal.deleteAccountDesc: This permanently deletes your account and all your data. This cannot be undone.
settingsModal.deleteAccountReasonPlaceholder: E.g. no longer job hunting, found another tool, etc.
settingsModal.deleteAccountReasonRequired: Tell us the reason before continuing
settingsModal.deleteAccountError: Couldn't delete the account. Try again or contact us.

login.title: Ergania
login.sessionClosedInfo: Your account was opened on another device. Close it there and log in again here to continue — only one active session is allowed at a time.
login.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
login.accountCreatedInfo: Account created! Check your email to confirm, then log in.
login.privacyNote: Your data is stored in your own account and no one else sees it.
login.forgotDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
login.resetLinkSentInfo: If an account exists with that email, we sent a link to reset your password. Check your inbox (and spam folder).

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.tagline: Choose a new password for your account
resetPassword.successInfo: Password updated! Taking you to the dashboard...
resetPassword.expiredHint: Recovery links expire after a while. Request a new one from the login screen.

dashboard.subtitle: Command center for AI-powered job search

androidBanner.text: Got Android? Download the Ergania app.

dashboard.noEvaluations: No evaluations yet. Add an offer!

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.evaluateDesc: Paste a job description or URL for AI evaluation
quickActions.portalsDesc: Enable Chilean and international job portals

backup.title: Back up your profile
backup.desc: Download a copy of your data so you don't lose it, or to continue on another device.
backup.restoreError: Restore error — make sure it's a valid backup file.

hero.subtitle: Ergania tailors your resume to each offer, evaluates whether it's worth applying, and preps you for the interview.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to your next opportunity
howItWorks.step1desc: Upload your resume as PDF or Word. We analyze it to understand your profile.
howItWorks.step2desc: Copy the job description you're interested in. We instantly evaluate the fit with your profile.
howItWorks.step3desc: You get your tailored resume, a cover letter, and an interview prep guide.

features.title: Tools built for you
features.f1desc: Automatically adjusts your resume for each role, highlighting what matters to the recruiter.
features.f2desc: Compatibility score: salary, stack, culture and distance. Know if it's worth applying before spending time.
features.f3desc: Common questions for the role, guided answers, and company-specific tips.

testimonials.title: People who use Ergania for their job search
testimonials.t1quote: "Intuitiva, facil de usar, muy buena app"
testimonials.t2quote: "Plataforma muy útil y completa, la recomiendo totalmente!"

pricing.title: Simple and straightforward
pricing.subtitle: 3 days free, then $9,990/month. Cancel anytime.
pricing.footnote: Secure payment with MercadoPago and PayPal · No commitment · Cancel from your account

careersProfile.title: Profile & Resume
careersProfile.subtitle: Personal data the AI uses to evaluate and personalize your resume
careersProfile.aiNote1: The AI reads this data to evaluate the fit with each offer and personalize your resume. Keep everything up to date for better results.
careersProfile.aiNote2: You can upload your resume (PDF, DOCX or TXT) with the
careersProfile.aiNote3: button to fill in the fields automatically.

compatibility.title: Compatibility analysis
compatibility.subtitle: Based on your resume, here's how it fits different specialties
compatibility.genericError: Couldn't analyze the resume. Try again.

fields.headline: Headline
fields.exitStoryPlaceholder: What makes you unique and why you're job searching now...

cvEditor.fileNote2: The AI reads this file to evaluate the fit with each offer.

translateModal.title: Resume translated to {{lang}}
translateModal.previewNote: Preview — not saved until you choose an action below.
translateModal.saveAsBaseTitle: Replaces your profile's Full Resume (Markdown) with this translated version

linkedinOptimizer.title: Optimize LinkedIn Profile
linkedinOptimizer.subtitle: Generates headline, about, skills and tips tailored to all your target roles at once
linkedinOptimizer.analyzingNote: Analyzing your resume and target roles to build your ideal profile...
linkedinOptimizer.keywordsLabel: Key keywords to show up in searches
linkedinOptimizer.keywordsNote: Make sure these keywords appear naturally in your About, experience and skills.
linkedinOptimizer.emptyState: Click "Generate optimization" to get personalized recommendations for your LinkedIn profile.

cvInstructions.desc: Write here how you want the AI to write your resume. For example: what experience to highlight, what to omit, your preferred tone, whether to include years of experience, etc. These instructions take top priority when generating each personalized resume.
cvInstructions.generateNote1: "Generate" applies these instructions to your base resume (the one in the section above) and lets you preview and download it as PDF — useful if you want to use it outside of a specific application. They're also applied every time you generate or regenerate the resume for

optimizedModal.title: Resume optimized with your instructions
optimizedModal.previewNote: Preview — not saved until you choose an action below.
optimizedModal.saveAsBaseTitle: Replaces your profile's Full Resume (Markdown) with this version

careersPortals.title: Job Portals
careersPortals.subtitle: {{enabled}} active of {{total}} · {{countries}} countries/regions ({{chile}} Chile)
careersPortals.morePortalsDesc: Extended catalog of international/LATAM job portals and recruitment agencies. Some don't have a confirmed own site — in those cases the link opens a Google search instead of risking an incorrect URL.
careersPortals.emptyState2: Add suggested portals using the buttons above.

searchFilters.title: Search Filters
searchFilters.desc: These keywords determine which offers are relevant. Only offers containing at least 1 positive and no negative keyword are shown.
searchFilters.editNote: To edit the filters, go to

careersPostulaciones.title: My Applications
careersPostulaciones.subtitle: Resume tailored per offer · Interview prep · Question answering
careersPostulaciones.emptyDesc: Create your first application — the AI builds the tailored resume for the offer

newModal.descOfferNoLink: Paste the description of the offer you received. The AI will use the content to generate the resume, prep the interview, and save the application.
newModal.descNew: You can paste the offer link or leave it empty if you only have the job description.
newModal.urlNoteOfferNoLink: This mode is meant for offers without a link. Leave this empty and paste the full job description.
newModal.urlNoteNew: If you don't have a URL, leave this empty and paste the full job description below.
newModal.jdPlaceholder: Paste here the full description of what you were offered: responsibilities, goals, tasks, expected outcomes, tools, etc.
newModal.aiWorkingNote: The AI is building your tailored resume — this takes ~30 seconds

cvPreview.generatedNote: AI-generated and tailored for this offer ·
cvPreview.regenerateTitle: Generates a new version of the resume in the selected language, applying your Profile's Writing Instructions
cvPreview.editCvTitle: Edit the resume text directly on the preview
cvPreview.editModeActive: Edit mode active — click on the resume text to modify it

interviewPrep.subtitle: Personalized guide based on your resume and the offer
interviewPrep.regenerateTitle: Regenerate the guide in the selected language
interviewPrep.readyDesc: The AI will analyze the offer and your resume to generate likely questions, how to answer them, and strategies for experience gaps.
interviewPrep.loadingNote: Analyzing offer and preparing your guide...
interviewPrep.downloadError: Error downloading the PDF. Try again.

qna.subtitle: The AI answers in a humanized way based on your resume
qna.questionLabel: Question from the form or interviewer:
qna.questionPlaceholder: Type the exact question you're being asked...
examples: Why do you want to work with us?
What experience do you have with [offer's technology]?
Tell us about a challenging project you've faced.
Why should we hire you for this role?

simulator.completed: You completed the simulation — {{count}} questions answered.
simulator.answerPlaceholder: Type your answer as if you were in the interview...

applyKit.noLetterNote: Generate a letter tailored to this offer, ready to copy into the form or email.

coverLetter.subtitle: AI-generated based on your resume and the offer

coverLetter.emptyNote: This application doesn't have a cover letter yet.

salary.subtitle: Net salary estimate for this specific application
salary.calculatedNote: Calculated when this offer was evaluated.

card.lowScoreTitle: Low score — may be hard to pass filters. Evaluate if it's worth the effort.

reportModal.noContent: The report has no content or wasn't found.

careersPipeline.title: Offer Pipeline
careersPipeline.subtitle: Evaluate offers with AI — paste a URL or the full posting text
careersPipeline.countryTitle: Offer's country — determines the currency and language of the analysis
careersPipeline.countryDefault: Country: based on my profile (Chile by default)

careersPipeline.blockedTip: 💡 Tip: For better results with Indeed / LinkedIn / Computrabajo
careersPipeline.blockedTipDesc: These portals block automatic access (403). Copy the full offer text and use it in "Paste JD text" mode so the AI can evaluate it correctly.
careersPipeline.jdPlaceholder: Paste here the full job posting text (include requirements, job description, company, etc.)
careersPipeline.analyzingBlocks: Evaluating blocks A-G: resume match, salary strategy, interview plan...
careersPipeline.emptyQueue: No offers in the queue. Add URLs above.
careersPipeline.blockedPortalNote: Portal blocked — paste the JD text for better results
careersPipeline.analyzingWithAi: Analyzing with AI: resume match, salary strategy, interview plan...
careersPipeline.timeoutError: The evaluation took too long (timeout). Try again or use "Paste JD text" mode.

evalResult.reusedNote: You already evaluated this offer on {{date}} — this is that result, no new query was spent.

careersScanner.title: Portal Scanner
careersScanner.subtitle: Automatically searches for jobs on Chilean portals (includes remote offers) and filters them by your profile

careersScanner.stoppedNote: Stopped by the user before finishing.

summary.goEvaluateNote2: to analyze the offers found with AI

emptyState.title: Scanner ready
emptyState.desc: Search Chilean portals (includes remote offers) using your target roles and keywords. For better results, configure your target roles first.
emptyState.zeroResultsNote2: and configure your target roles and keywords first.

careersBusqueda.title: My Search
careersBusqueda.subtitle: Configure the roles and skills you're looking for — the Scanner uses them to filter offers

targetRoles.title: Target Roles
targetRoles.desc: Exact job titles you're looking for — the scanner filters portals with these words

skills.title: Skills / Keywords
skills.desc: Key technologies and skills — if they appear in an offer's title, it takes priority

exclude.title: Exclude
exclude.desc: Words that automatically rule out an offer — call center, sales, etc.

queries.title: Search Queries
queries.empty: No queries — click "Add" or use "Analyze with AI"

suggestions.title: AI Suggestions
suggestions.analyzing: Analyzing your resume and the Chilean market... (~10 sec)
suggestions.genericError: Error connecting to the server. Make sure the backend is running.

finalTip.label: 💡 Tip:
finalTip.part1: Save your changes and then go to the
finalTip.part2: to find new offers on the portals using these filters. The scanner uses your keywords to detect which offers are relevant to you.

contactModal.title: Contact us
contactModal.subtitle: We'll get back to you shortly

contactModal.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...

preguntas.title: Frequently asked questions
preguntas.subtitle: Find your answer before writing to us

preguntas.notFound: Didn't find your answer? Write to us and we'll reply by email — your conversation isn't lost, just reply to the email you receive to keep talking with us.

guideModal.title: How to use Ergania
guideModal.subtitle: 6 steps to find your ideal job

1.title: Set up your profile and resume
1.desc: Enter your experience, skills, and the resume you want to present. The AI will use this info to personalize each evaluation.

2.title: Define your search
2.desc: Specify the roles you're looking for and key keywords. The Scanner will filter thousands of offers using these criteria.

3.title: Enable job portals
3.desc: Select the portals you want to monitor: GetOnBoard, Bumeran, LinkedIn, Indeed and more.

4.title: Scan offers automatically
4.desc: The Scanner goes through the active portals and brings you only the offers that match your search.

5.title: Evaluate each offer with AI
5.desc: Paste the URL or text of an offer. The AI analyzes the fit with your profile, suggests salary strategy, and prepares interview questions.

6.title: Track your applications
6.desc: Follow each application from "Evaluated" to "Offer received". All in one place.

apiKeyModal.title: My API Keys
apiKeyModal.intro: Enter your own keys. They're stored only in your browser, never sent to third parties.
apiKeyModal.footerNote: Only in your browser. Never sent to the server.

gemini.linkLabel: Get your free key at Google AI Studio

anthropic.linkLabel: Get your key at Anthropic Console

openai.linkLabel: Get your key at OpenAI Platform
